sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7796" key="a)naxa/ragh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναχάρ-ᾰγή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scraping up,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:47:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
